growth_records.strain: SAD (model iOB638), in mixed anaerobic enrichment subculture SC05-UT
growth_records.medium: Anaerobic defined mineral medium (set up as in ref 15), amended with chloroform + H2

up.units: mmol/day per bottle (0.053 mmol over 5 days)
up.method: calculated from Table 1: 0.053 mmol CF degraded, days 0-5

up.units: mmol/day per bottle (0.016 mmol over 5 days)
up.method: calculated from Table 1: 0.016 mmol DCM degraded, days 0-5 (some DCM from CF consumed concurrently)

up.units: electron donor in Mode 1; specific rate not reported

sec.units: CF reduced to DCM (Mode 1); net DCM shown as consumed 0.016 mmol

yields.copies_yield: (3.7 +/- 0.78) x 10^13 16S rRNA copies per eeq donor

growth_records.cite: Bulka et al. Modeling reveals a metabolic basis of competition among dichloromethane-degrading Dehalobacter strains. mSystems (2025). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00847-25. [PMC12542780]
growth_records.snippet: In the three SC05-UT bottles, only strain SAD grew during CF dechlorination ... SAD 16S rRNA copies/mL 1.68 x 10^7 (initial) to 5.61 x 10^7 (final), days 0-5, CF degraded 0.053 mmol (Table 1, Mode 1).
growth_records.notes: Growth Mode 1 (H2/CF, CF dechlorination), SC05-UT, days 0-5. Strain SAD 16S copies/mL: 1.68e7 -> 5.61e7. Calculated specific growth rate mu = ln(5.61e7/1.68e7)/5 d = ln(3.339)/5 = 1.2059/5 = 0.2412 /day = 0.2412/24 = 0.01005 /h. Doubling time = ln2/0.01005 = 68.98 h (2.87 d). CF uptake = 0.053 mmol / 5 d = 0.0106 mmol/day/bottle; DCM net consumed = 0.016 mmol / 5 d = 0.0032 mmol/day/bottle. Rates are per-bottle totals (biomass in gDW and culture volume not given, so cannot convert to mmol/gDW/h). Mixed community + qPCR-based abundance -> low confidence. Yields from Table 1: (3.7+/-0.78)e13 16S copies and (9.3+/-1.9)e12 cells per eeq donor.

growth_records.strain: SAD (model iOB638), in mixed anaerobic enrichment subculture SC05-UT
growth_records.medium: Anaerobic defined mineral medium (ref 15), DCM-fed (Mode 3 mineralization)

up.units: mmol/day per bottle (0.036 mmol over 14 days)
up.method: calculated from Table 1: 0.036 mmol DCM degraded, days 12-26

yields.copies_yield: (9.4 +/- 3.0) x 10^12 16S rRNA copies per eeq donor

growth_records.cite: Bulka et al. Modeling reveals a metabolic basis of competition among dichloromethane-degrading Dehalobacter strains. mSystems (2025). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00847-25. [PMC12542780]
growth_records.snippet: During DCM mineralization (Mode 3), ... SAD 16S rRNA copies/mL 2.54 x 10^7 (initial) to 3.90 x 10^7 (final), days 12-26, DCM degraded 0.036 mmol (Table 1).
growth_records.notes: Growth Mode 3 (DCM/H+, DCM mineralization), SC05-UT, days 12-26 (14 d). Strain SAD 16S copies/mL: 2.54e7 -> 3.90e7. mu = ln(3.90e7/2.54e7)/14 = ln(1.5354)/14 = 0.42871/14 = 0.030623 /day = 0.001276 /h. Doubling time = ln2/0.001276 = 543.2 h (22.6 d). DCM uptake = 0.036 mmol/14 d = 0.002571 mmol/day/bottle. Per-bottle totals; mixed community qPCR -> low confidence. Yields (Table 1): (9.4+/-3.0)e12 16S copies and (2.4+/-0.75)e12 cells per eeq donor.
